description: Non-interactive SSH connectivity probe — reports whether the host is reachable (read-only).
rules: read-only — runs the no-op `true` remotely, changes nothing on the host
BatchMode=yes — never prompts; a missing key or auth failure is reported, not hung on
the private key is an optional *_FILE pointer passed to ssh -i, never an inline secret
always writes ssh_check.json (reachable true|false) even when the host is down
usage: Set SSH_HOST + SSH_USER (and SSH_KEY_FILE for key auth). Output: ssh_check.json.
limitation: Probes reachability + auth only; runs no real command and inspects no remote state.
